description_long: This object is a classic hot dog nestled in a soft, lightly speckled bun, presented on a crumpled sheet of beige paper. The sausage is topped with a generous swirl of bright yellow mustard and thin slices of red onion and green pickles, adding color and texture. The bun appears fluffy and slightly glossy, with visible sesame seeds scattered across its surface. The hot dog is partially exposed, with the sausage and toppings clearly visible from above, while the paper wrap cradles the entire assembly and extends outward in a casual, street-food style. Two slices of pickle and a ring of onion have fallen out and rest on the paper in front of the hot dog. The overall appearance is appetizing and typical of a street vendor or park food stand.
description: A classic hot dog in a sesame bun with mustard, onions, and pickles, served on a crumpled paper wrap. Some toppings have fallen onto the paper, enhancing its street-food appeal.
description_view_0: The hot dog is viewed from above, showing the bun split open with the sausage, mustard, onions, and pickles clearly visible, and the paper wrap fanned out beneath.
description_view_1: A side view reveals the full length of the hot dog and bun, with two toppings (a pickle slice and onion ring) lying on the paper in front.
description_view_2: A rear angle similar to view 0, but with the fallen toppings more visible to the left and right of the hot dog.
description_view_3: A low, rear view showing mostly the back of the bun and the paper wrap, with minimal visibility of the sausage or toppings.
